#  Announcing the Release of Apache Flink 1.15
May 5, 2022 - Joe Moser (@JoemoeAT) Yun Gao (@YunGao16)
Thanks to our well-organized and open community, Apache Flink continues to grow as a technology and remain one of the most active project…
